questionHtml: Using the regression equation, estimate the number of hot chocolates that Lucy will sell on a day when the maximum temperature is 12°C.
markschemeHtml:
correct substitution into their equation       (A1)

eg       -9.85×12+222

103.435  (103.8 from 3 sf)

103  (hot chocolates)        A1  N2

[2 marks]

meta.title: Using the regression equation, estimate the number of hot chocolates that Lucy will sell on a day when the maximum temperature is 12°C.
